title: pilosella obscura
intro: Pilosella obscura, also known as Obscure Mouse-ear, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, as well as supporting the immune system. Pilosella obscura can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
